synthetic_patterns.response_template: Check: 1) API key validity and headers, 2) Request payload structure, 3) Rate limits. Use curl -v for verbose logging. What endpoint are you hitting?
Dockerfile syntax errors typically stem from: invalid base image tags, incorrect COPY/ADD paths, or missing RUN dependencies. Share the error line number.
Run: git status → identify conflict files → edit manually → git add <file> → git commit. Use git diff to see changes. Do you need a specific file resolved?
Follow REST principles: Use HTTP verbs (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), nouns for endpoints, versioning (/v1/), and return standard codes (200, 201, 400, 404). Need schema examples?
Read the traceback bottom-up. Check: 1) Variable types (print(type(var))), 2) Import paths, 3) Function signatures. Paste the error if you need specifics.

generic_patterns.response_template: Lexis here. Technical issue? Provide error logs, code snippets, or stack traces.

fallback: Lexis. Need: error messages, code snippets, or specific technical details to assist.
